• NEW GAME MODE: Princess Gambit – no King Tower, no deck draft
• NEW Collection Level, replacing King’s Journey
• Seasonal Trophy Road is BACK, with a twist
• COMING IN JULY: New Card + C.H.A.O.S 2.0"

title: Pikmin Bloom
notes:
Thanks for playing Pikmin Bloom! New in this version:

- Adjusted the sorting order of mushrooms in the Expeditions Tab. Mushroom battles you've been invited to will continue to be prioritized. If you still have free mushroom battle tries remaining for the day, mushrooms with four or fewer participants will now be shown next.
- Minor improvements and bug fixes.

*Please download the latest version of the app from the store for the changes above to be reflected.

title: RAID: Shadow Legends
notes:
New in 11.65.0:

FEATURES:
- Added the Win Streak mode in Live Arena & improved Live Arena matchmaking
- Added Quick Battle option to Chimera Battles
- Added 40 new Gemstones, earned from Live Arena
- Introduced the ability to assign duplicate Mythical Champions as Faction Guardians in the Guardian Ring
- Rebalanced the Plarium Points Program so users can progress faster
- Increased the chances of summoning Perfect Souls for specific Champions in the Altar of Souls' Wishlist
- Champion rebalance
